data.title: South Korea Secures Major Oil Supplies from Kazakhstan, Oman, and Saudi Arabia
data.description: South Korea has successfully secured hundreds of millions of barrels of crude oil along with new naphtha supplies from Kazakhstan, Oman, and Saudi Arabia. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the strategic move by South Korea to bolster its energy reserves amid global market fluctuations. This acquisition is part of South Korea's ongoing efforts to ensure energy security and stability in the region. The deals with these countries underscore the importance of diversifying energy sources and maintaining robust international partnerships. South Korea's proactive approach in securing these supplies reflects its commitment to sustaining economic growth and energy independence.

data.title: Rice Prices Surge Amid Supply Concerns Due to Iran Conflict
data.description: Rice prices have experienced their most significant increase in over two years, driven by concerns over supply disruptions. Bloomberg posted on X that the recent conflict involving Iran has led to a spike in fuel and fertilizer costs, which are critical inputs for rice production. This development has raised alarms about potential shortages and increased costs for consumers globally. The situation underscores the vulnerability of agricultural markets to geopolitical tensions, as rising input costs can significantly impact food prices. Analysts are closely monitoring the situation to assess the potential long-term effects on the global rice market.

data.title: An ancient whale that had been dormant for 14.5 years holding 3,000 BTC transferred 500 BTC, worth $37.04 million.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ai Yi, an ancient whale that had been dormant for 14.5 years holding 3,000 BTC has moved its holdings again after four months, transferring 500 BTC, worth $37.04 million, to a new address (bc1q9...h0s2j). The whale's cost was $0.37 per BTC, and it currently holds 2,359 BTC, worth $174 million.

data.title: On Polymarket, the probability of SpaceX's IPO closing with a market capitalization exceeding $2 trillion is 47%.
data.description: According to Polymarket's prediction market page, the highest probability option for SpaceX's IPO closing market capitalization is over $2 trillion, with approximately 47% probability. This is followed by $1.8 trillion to $2 trillion (18%), $1.6 trillion to $1.8 trillion (13.7%), and $1.4 trillion to $1.6 trillion (7.8%). Bitget launched its IPO Prime service on April 10th, initially supporting stablecoin subscriptions for SpaceX, with a reference valuation of approximately $1.5 trillion. In addition, Bitget will distribute two rounds of preSPAX airdrops to VIP members, with the first round of 760 preSPAX tokens to be distributed tomorrow and the second round of 190 preSPAX tokens to be distributed on April 20th.

data.title: 21Shares Plans Hyperliquid ETF Launch on Nasdaq
data.description: 21Shares has submitted a second amended S-1 filing for its Hyperliquid ETF, outlining plans for a 20,000-share seed basket to acquire HYPE prior to listing. According to NS3.AI, the fund is anticipated to be listed on Nasdaq under the ticker THYP. The trust aims to stake between 30% and 70% of its HYPE holdings.

data.title: Trader Killa: This will be the last swing short BTC of this cycle.
data.description: Trader Killa posted on the X platform that this will be his last short position on BTC this cycle. He stated that he will either trigger a stop loss or hold until the target price, betting that the cycle time has not deviated significantly.

data.title: U.S. Increases Troop Deployment in Middle East Amid Tensions with Iran
data.description: The United States has increased its military presence in the Middle East by deploying thousands more troops, as U.S. President Donald Trump seeks to exert pressure on Iran. According to NS3.AI, this strategic move is aimed at reinforcing the U.S. stance in the region amid escalating tensions with Tehran. The deployment is part of a broader effort to address security concerns and maintain stability in the area.

data.title: The Central Bank of Pakistan has allowed banks to open accounts for licensed virtual asset service providers.
data.description: The Central Bank of Pakistan has officially allowed banks to open accounts for licensed virtual asset service providers, lifting its 2018 ban. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Gold and silver prices trended upwards, with Gate.com's metals contracts showing the highest trading activity in the industry.
data.description: The metals market continued its upward trend. International silver reached a 24-hour high of $81.07, currently trading at $80.20, a 24-hour increase of approximately 5.24%; international gold reached a 24-hour high of $4,847.1, currently trading at $4,806.1, a 24-hour increase of approximately 1.35%. Against the backdrop of continued strength in metal prices, market trading sentiment has clearly heated up. According to CoinGlass data, metal contract trading on the Gate platform has been very active. Silver contract trading volume reached approximately $168 million in the past 24 hours, ranking among the top in the industry; gold current open interest is approximately $35.8041 million, also at a leading level. Driven by rising prices, bullish sentiment is dominant, further boosting market activity. Gate pioneered a metal contract trading section, providing 24/7 uninterrupted trading, offering users greater strategic flexibility and asset management efficiency in volatile market conditions. Gate contracts cover a wide range of traditional financial assets, including stocks, metals, forex, indices, and commodities, supporting trading in core assets such as gold, silver, and popular global stocks. Gate continues to build a more efficient and professional one-stop trading platform for multi-asset trading for users worldwide.

data.title: U.S. Senate Agenda Lacks Digital Asset Legislation Discussion
data.description:
The U.S. Senate's agenda for the upcoming week includes only a nomination hearing, with no scheduled discussions on digital assets or the CLARITY Act. According to BlockBeats, this information was revealed on the Senate Banking Committee's official website.

Additionally, Politico reports that Senator Thom Tillis is set to release the final draft of a bill this week, which is a crucial step before the committee's markup meeting. The bill must align with the Senate Agriculture Committee and pass a full Senate vote with a 60-vote threshold, requiring Democratic support, before coordination with the House.

Analysts suggest that if a markup meeting is not scheduled between April 20 and 25, the bill could be jeopardized by midterm election politics, potentially ending bipartisan cooperation.

data.title: Investors Await Outcome of Potential US-Iran Talks
data.description: Financial markets are experiencing a rare calm as investors anticipate developments from a potential second round of discussions between the United States and Iran. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the cautious stance of market participants amid geopolitical uncertainties. The anticipation stems from the possibility of diplomatic engagements that could influence global economic conditions. Investors are closely monitoring the situation, aware that any significant progress or setbacks in these talks could have substantial implications for financial markets worldwide.

data.title: Japan Extends Oil Reserve Measures Amid Middle East Tensions
data.description: On April 15, Japan announced the extension of measures to release private oil reserves by one month due to ongoing tensions in the Middle East. According to BlockBeats, the Japanese government made this decision to ensure stability in oil supply. As of April 12, Japan's private oil reserves were sufficient for approximately 78 days, and when combined with national reserves, the total reserve capacity amounts to 222 days.

data.title: 国投白银LOF Announces Temporary Trading Suspension
data.description: 国投白银LOF has announced a temporary suspension of trading starting from the market opening on April 16, 2026, until 10:30 on the same day. According to Jin10, redemption services will continue as usual during the suspension period. Trading will resume at 10:30 on April 16, 2026.

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | India's March Gold Imports Estimated at $2.98 Billion
data.description: India's gold imports for March were estimated at $2.98 billion, according to calculations by Reuters. This figure reflects the country's ongoing demand for the precious metal, which plays a significant role in its economy and cultural practices. According to Jin10, the import data highlights the importance of gold in India's trade balance and its impact on the global gold market. The estimation provides insight into the trends and economic factors influencing India's gold import activities.

data.title: US President Trump is attempting to pressure Iran, and the US is sending thousands more troops to the Middle East.
data.description: According to the Washington Post: US President Trump is trying to pressure Iran, and the US is sending thousands more troops to the Middle East.

data.title: Morgan Stanley's MSBT ETF Acquires $83.6 Million in Bitcoin Since Launch
data.description: Morgan Stanley's MSBT ETF has made significant investments in Bitcoin since its inception this week. According to Odaily, the ETF has purchased $83.6 million worth of Bitcoin, with its on-chain address currently holding approximately $64.4 million in Bitcoin.

data.title: Bittensor Faces Significant Token Value Decline
data.description: Bittensor, known as a leading decentralized AI platform, recently experienced a dramatic drop in its token value. According to PANews, the value of Bittensor's token, $TAO, plummeted between 15% and 25% in a single day. This sudden decline has significantly impacted the assets of many investors who had faith in the platform.

data.title: STRC's two-day fundraising campaign can purchase 26,334 BTC.
data.description: Michael Saylor's Bitcoin treasury company, Strategy (STRC), raised enough funds in two days to purchase 26,334 bitcoins, representing approximately 0.15% of the total bitcoin supply. Strategy currently holds a total of 807,231 bitcoins.

data.title: Morgan Stanley-related MSBT ETFs have purchased $83.6 million worth of BTC this week.
data.description: According to Arkham's monitoring, the MSBT ETF, which is related to Morgan Stanley, has purchased $83.6 million worth of BTC since its inception this week, and its on-chain addresses currently hold approximately $64.4 million worth of BTC.
